visual_description: A man in glasses and a suit looks toward the camera in a dimly lit setting. Three men walk together in a dark alley, with a man in a red jacket and bandana on the left, a man in a tan jacket and patterned shirt in the center, and a man in dark clothing on the right. The camera focuses on the man in the tan jacket as he looks forward and appears to speak.
audio_description: A male voice speaks Mandarin in a calm tone, and another voice issues a warning.
